plugins.name: onboarding
plugins.description: Personal AI onboarding - creates CLAUDE.md, user-profile, course-goals, and SOUL.md through a conversational interview.

plugins.name: daily-log
plugins.description: Daily 5-minute energy-mood-focus journal with auto-enrichment pattern analysis every 3rd entry.

plugins.name: atomize
plugins.description: Extract atomic ideas from text into Zettelkasten-style notes with tags and wikilink connections.

plugins.name: linkedin-research-post
plugins.description: Research a topic across LinkedIn, Reddit, YouTube via sub-agents, then draft and publish a LinkedIn post in your voice.

plugins.name: slide-inspector
plugins.description: Systematic quality audit for PowerPoint decks — programmatic XML analysis for overlaps, fragmentation, code styling, plus a visual inspection checklist. Use as post-creation QA after the pptx skill.
